title: from_uri_wrong_backend comment is factually wrong about VAULT_TOKEN
description: The comment 'If VAULT_TOKEN is absent we still get an error, just a different one' is incorrect. The backend check (aws-sm != vault) fires before the VAULT_TOKEN check, so this test always returns InvalidUri regardless of whether VAULT_TOKEN is set. The comment implies conditional behavior that does not exist, which misleads contributors. Fix: remove the misleading conditional sentence.
